$comment: TracePilot performance budgets — CI enforced. Update when architecture changes intentionally increase a budget.

frontend.notes: Measured from `pnpm --filter @tracepilot/desktop build --mode analyze`. Total includes JS + CSS assets.

ipc.notes: Measured on a corpus of ~100 sessions. These are P95 targets. Cached IPC calls (checkSystemDeps, getWorktreeDiskUsage, getSearchFacets) assume warm cache.

rust.notes: Measured via `cargo bench -p tracepilot-bench`. Values are P95 of mean estimate.
